final:
module RefModule (
    input wire D,
    input wire CLK,
    input wire RESET,
    output reg Q
);
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge CLK or negedge RESET or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (!RESET) begin
            Q <= 1'b0; // asynchronous reset
        end else begin
            Q <= D; // capture D on rising edge of CLK
        end
    end
endmodule
